testcase.name: Integration: Auth and Generation Routing › dashboard redirects anonymous users to login with returnTo
Integration: Auth and Generation Routing › unknown generation renders not-found state in non-demo mode

testcase.name: Integration: Simple Mode Runtime Path › non-demo run still supports home prompt handoff to simple route
